Question: Describe the process of digestion and how nutrients are absorbed.
Answer: Digestion is the process of breaking down complex food into simple soluble substances. Digestion begins in the mouth and continues in stomach and intestines. Nutrients are absorbed through the walls of the small intestine into the bloodstream.
